clinicalProblem.clinicalIntent: Standardized home blood pressure monitoring protocol to obtain accurate, actionable readings for hypertension diagnosis and management
clinicalProblem.whenToUse: Pre-appointment preparation, initial hypertension diagnosis, medication adjustment monitoring, remote patient monitoring
clinicalProblem.decisionOrAction: Generate validated BP readings + documentation for clinical decision-making

navigationPath.purpose: Display measurement rules (no talking, phone, TV)
Show 2 readings, 1 min apart, twice daily
Explain morning (post-void, pre-meds, pre-meal) + bedtime readings
Guide for written or electronic logging

validationRules: Readings must be taken 1 minute apart
Morning readings: after bladder emptying, before medication, before eating
Minimum 3 days, preferred 7 days of measurements
No talking, phone use, or TV during measurement

rules: Enforce quiet environment (no talking, phone, TV) during measurement
Validate 2 readings taken 1 minute apart per session
Verify morning timing: post-void, pre-medication, pre-meal
Flag incomplete or improperly timed readings
Calculate average of readings if complete

categories.name: Complete Protocol
categories.requirement: 7 days, 2 readings AM + 2 readings PM, properly timed

categories.name: Incomplete Protocol
categories.requirement: <3 days or missing readings or improper timing

recommendedNextStep.description: e.g., 'Share readings with clinician' or 'Continue monitoring to reach 7 days'

crisis.description: false for HBPM protocol only (actual BP values determine crisis)

escalationLogic.ifAnySymptomPresent: Stop HBPM protocol → recommend ER immediately
escalationLogic.ifNoSymptoms: Complete current reading → flag for clinician review → continue protocol

appDisplay.screenType: Standard HBPM with crisis alert overlay if thresholds met
appDisplay.behavior: Prioritize crisis routing over HBPM completion if thresholds + symptoms

nextStepRouting.providerSuggestion: Share documented HBPM readings with clinician before or during appointment
nextStepRouting.followUpTiming: Repeat 3-7 day HBPM protocol every 3-6 months or as directed by clinician
nextStepRouting.repeatMeasurement: If incomplete protocol (<3 days or improper timing), restart 3-7 day protocol
nextStepRouting.navigatorEscalation: If crisis thresholds met + symptoms, escalate to care team immediately
nextStepRouting.documentation: Log all readings, dates, times, and protocol completion status to health record
